acceptance_criteria.text: Manual news generation records active pattern usage and result metrics.
Manual review replies record active pattern usage and result metrics.
Card automation news/review replies record impact.
Content plan news drafts record impact.
Telegram health includes news/review impact counters.
Relevant tests and production smoke checks pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/core/industry_pattern_recalibration.py src/main.py src/core/card_automation.py src/services/content_plan_service.py src/telegram_bot.py

python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
known_gaps: Observational measurement only; no A/B attribution.
Monthly impact report remains next stage.
